name: login-title-ko
desc: Load the official Korean login/title texture instead of the Japanese title texture while preserving the original logo artwork. FUN_0051cda0's initial scene resolves the hardcoded asset string /../data/image/gamemenu/title_japan.tga; the deploy/package steps restore title_korea.tga from title_korea.original.tga so generated glyph overlays are not shipped.
verified: RE string xref: logh7_redex str title reports VA 0x00786998 /../data/image/gamemenu/title_japan.tga. Same-length ASCII asset path patch; live visual confirmation required after build.
